# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

---  
$schema = "http://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2015-01-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
parameters:
  location:    #(location for the resource group and VMs)    
  vmNamePrefix:      # (prefix of your virtual machine name, e.g., prod or devvm )  
  adminUserName:       #admin user's username to use on hostVM which will also be used as local administrator account in Azure portal after deployment         
  sourceImage:         #source image for the VM such ubuntu/centos etc     
  vmSize:             #your desired size of virtual machine (e.g., Standard_D2,Standard_L4)    
  
variables:   
  $storageAccountNamePrefix = '{0}' + $vmNamePrefix      + '-storeacc'        //(unique storage account name for all data disks in the same region and location as resource group).  This will be used to create Azure Storage Accounts.)        
   $location  = parameters('Location')          # (set this parameter when creating a new deployment)  
  $vmName = '{0}' + $parameters ('Vmnameprefix')  + '.windows.azure.com'      //(unique VM name in the resource group).This is used as FQDN for Azure Portal and DNS Name label    
   $size = $variables('$vmSize').split('/');       #parse size from ARM template parameter   	  		 			              									         	   	 						                  															            `"      //Parse out the VM Size.                           	       ^                          v                 a                  r                     e                    s                       t
   $sourceImageSku = $parameters('Sourceimage') + 'SKU'       #(make sure to provide SKUS of source image in ARM template as it varies by region and publisher.)  	    				          		 	   					                                                      .replace('/','sku-');                         ^                           v                              
   $publisherName = resourceGroup().Tags['providers/Microsoft.Compute/locations/{0}/publishers/{1}'.format($location, $parameters('Sourceimage'))]   //Publish name will be same as source image publisher in ARM template   				        	 ^          v                       ^          
   $planName = '{2}' +  $vmnameprefix  +'-Plan'        # (unique plan or offer/sku for VM).This is used to create an Azure Virtual Machine Marketplace Offer and Plan)    			      		             .replace('/','');              +    //.format($location, $parameters('Sourceimage'), 'PublisherName') 
   $storageAccountType = 'Standard_LRS'      #default storage account type set by default in the ARM template        	  	   					          				    ^                                                     v             a                 r                    e                  s       t        i n f y                   u               l o c k    .replace('/','');             
  $diskName = '{1}' + $vmnameprefix  + '-os-'          # (unique name for OS disk)  //Set up the os disks.    	  ^                           v                 a                  r                     e                    s                       t       i n f y                   u               l o c k    .replace('/','');             
  $dataDiskName = '{1}' + $vmnameprefix  + '-dsk-'      # (unique name for data disks)     //Set up the datadisk         ^                           v                 a                  r                     e                    s                       t       i n f y                   u               l o c k    .replace('/','');             
  
resources: 		                                          		//Begin Resource section.                           	       ^+                          -                            +                     ++                       ++++                              +  // + (Add more resources here as required)  +                                  ^                 v                  a                     e                    s                t      i n f y                   u               l o c k     .replace('/','')
   storageAccounts:            #create an Azure Storage account with the unique name.      	                                             		 									       	 			         	   	//(CreateAzureStorage)                             (Use below line for ARM template to create a single instance of this resource.)   ^      v     r e             s t        
   outputs:                #outputs section is used when you want Azure portal and CLI or other tools like PowerShell scripts/SDK calls from your templates.          //End Output Section (Use below line for ARM template to end the output of this resource.)   ^      v     r e             s t        
   IaaSWebApp:                  #create an App Service Plan in Azure with single web app, and provide parameters such as server farm or unique name.          //Create a new instance (use below line for ARM template to create instances of this resource.)   ^      v     r e             s t        
   myVMExtension:          	#Creates the Virtual Machine Extension which configures Linux OS by installing required software on VMs using customScript extension within Azure.          //Begin a new instance (use below line for ARM template to create instances of this resource.)   ^      v     r e             s t        
   myVMExtensionUpdate:            #update an existing virtual machine or scale out the deployment by updating Virtual Machine Extension configuration with VMs in multi-vm setup.          //End a new instance (use below line for ARM template to end instances of this resource.)   ^      v     r e             s t        
   myVMWithNetworkInterface:            #Creates an existing virtual machine or scales out deployment by adding network interfaces within the VMs and multi-vm setup.          //Begin a new instance (use below line for ARM template to create instances of this resource.)   ^      v     r e             s t        
   myVMWithPublicIP:            #Creates an existing virtual machine or scales out deployment by adding public IP addresses within the VMs and multi-vm setup.          //End a new instance (use below line for ARM template to end instances of this resource.)   ^      v     r e             s t        
   myVMWithRdpPublicConfig:            #Creates an existing virtual machine or scales out deployment by adding RDP public configuration within the VMs and multi-vm setup.          //Begin a new instance (use below line for ARM template to create instances of this resource.)   ^      v     r e             s t        
   myVMWithDiskEncryption:            #Creates an existing virtual machine or scales out deployment by enabling disk encryption within the VMs and multi-vm setup.          //End a new instance (use below line for ARM template to end instances of this resource.)   ^      v     r e             s t
   myVMWithSecurityFeatures:            #Creates an existing virtual machine or scales out deployment by adding security features within the VMs and multi-vm setup.          //Begin a new instance (use below line for ARM template to create instances of this resource.)   ^      v     r e             s t        
   myVMWithDataDiskEncryption:            #Creates an existing virtual machine or scales out deployment by enabling data disk encryption within the VMs and multi-vm setup.          //End a new instance (use below line for ARM template to end instances of this resource.)   ^      v     r e             s t
